parameters.name: op
parameters.label: Reference Operator
parameters.description: This node is used to specify the time referenced by the . The time is defined by the Time found at

parameters.name: usetimecode
parameters.label: Use Timecode
parameters.description: When enabled, the will get its time from a timecode reference, rather than the . The Operator will still be used for bpm, time signature, start, and end values.

parameters.name: timecodeop
parameters.label: Timecode Object/CHOP/DAT
parameters.description: a timecode that sets the time. Should be a reference to either a with channels 'hour', 'second', 'minute', 'frame', a with a timecode string in its first cell, or a object. The Operator will still be

parameters.name: frame
parameters.label: Frame
parameters.description: Output a channel for frame number.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Rate
parameters.description: Output a channel for the rate (frames per second).

parameters.name: start
parameters.label: Start
parameters.description: Output a channel with the Start frame value.

parameters.name: end
parameters.label: End
parameters.description: Output a channel with the End frame value.

parameters.name: rangestart
parameters.label: Range Start
parameters.description: Output a channel with the Range Start frame value.

parameters.name: rangeend
parameters.label: Range End
parameters.description: Output a channel with the Range End frame value.

parameters.name: signature1
parameters.label: Signature 1
parameters.description: Output a channel for the first number in the timing signature, how many beats are in a measure.

parameters.name: signature2
parameters.label: Signature 2
parameters.description: Output a channel for the second number in the timing signature, which kind of note constitutes one beat.

parameters.name: bpm
parameters.label: BPM
parameters.description: Output a channel with the BPM value.

parameters.name: play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: Output a channel with the current play state.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: second
parameters.label: Second
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: absframe
parameters.label: Absframe
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: abssecond
parameters.label: Abssecond
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
